project_context.vibe: Clean, minimal, professional, editorial, confident, restrained. No generic tech-SaaS styles. Highly objective and functional.

headings.usage: Used for page titles, summary stat numbers, and primary section headers.

body.usage: Used for all standard UI copy, descriptions, and lists.

mono.usage: Used strictly for numerical data, hours tracked, dates, and project metadata (like tags).

delivered.note: High contrast black block. Strong visual anchor.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding: p-6 or p-8 for cards. gap-6 or gap-8 for grids.

patterns.dashboard_header: Solid surface with crisp border-b. High contrast typographic logo.
patterns.summary_stats: Grid layout (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4) with border-collapse technical look. Items separated by sharp 1px borders.
patterns.project_list: Table or dense row-based layout. Rows separated by border-b. No heavy drop shadows. Focus on pure alignment.

component_rules.cards: Flat design. bg-white, 1px solid border-neutral-200. NO box-shadow. Sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm).

buttons.primary: bg-neutral-950 text-white hover:bg-neutral-800 rounded-none px-6 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-neutral-900 border border-neutral-200 hover:bg-neutral-50 rounded-none px-6 py-2 transition-colors

component_rules.inputs: bg-white border-neutral-200 rounded-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-neutral-950 focus:border-neutral-950 transition-all
component_rules.badges: rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border
component_rules.delivered_state_visual: When a project is 'Delivered' or 'Final', the project title MUST have a strikethrough (line-through text-neutral-400), and its row background should slightly dim (bg-neutral-50) to instantly separate active vs completed tasks.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp and immediate. bg-color shifts only. Avoid floating or scaling animations to keep the print/editorial feel.
motion_and_interactions.focus: High contrast focus rings (ring-1 ring-neutral-950 ring-offset-2) required for all interactive elements.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5, strict monochrome (neutral-900 or neutral-500).

images.description: Minimalist geometric architecture. Use as a very subtle, low-opacity (10%) background texture for the public 'Boss View' header to give it a high-end, premium feel.

attributes: All buttons, inputs, tabs, and interactive rows MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='add-project-btn'`, `data-testid='project-row-delivered'`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure Cabinet Grotesk, Satoshi, and JetBrains Mono fonts.
Implement the UI using pure Shadcn components but strip away their default border-radius (set to rounded-none or rounded-sm) and box-shadows to fit the Swiss/Brutalist look.
Ensure the 'Delivered' and 'Final' status apply a line-through CSS class to the Project Title.
Build a grid-based 'Control Room' style top section for summary stats.
The public share page (`/share/[token]`) must strip all edit buttons, inputs, and dropdowns, rendering purely as a read-only report.
